query:
-- TESTE 3: Indicadores com Dados Reais
-- 1. Negócios no mês (valor)
SELECT 'Negócios no mês (valor)' as indicador, 
       SUM(saleValue) as valor,
       COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM sales 
WHERE MONTH(createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(createdAt) = YEAR(NOW());

-- 2. Negócios no mês (unidades)
SELECT 'Negócios no mês (unidades)' as indicador,
       COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM sales 
WHERE MONTH(createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(createdAt) = YEAR(NOW());

-- 3. Vendas Canceladas
SELECT 'Vendas Canceladas' as indicador,
       COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM sales 
WHERE status = 'cancelled' AND MONTH(createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(createdAt) = YEAR(NOW());

-- 4. Comissão Recebida (status = paid)
SELECT 'Comissão Recebida' as indicador,
       SUM(commissionValue) as valor,
       COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM commissions 
WHERE status = 'paid' AND MONTH(createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(createdAt) = YEAR(NOW());

-- 5. Comissão Vendida (todas as comissões do mês)
SELECT 'Comissão Vendida' as indicador,
       SUM(commissionValue) as valor,
       COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM commissions 
WHERE MONTH(createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(createdAt) = YEAR(NOW());

-- 6. % comissão vendida
SELECT 'Percentual Comissão Vendida' as indicador,
       ROUND((SUM(c.commissionValue) / SUM(s.saleValue)) * 100, 2) as percentual
FROM commissions c
JOIN sales s ON c.saleId = s.id
WHERE MONTH(c.createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(c.createdAt) = YEAR(NOW());

-- 7. Negócios acima de 1 milhão
SELECT 'Negócios acima de 1M' as indicador,
       COUNT(*) as quantidade,
       SUM(saleValue) as valor_total
FROM sales 
WHERE saleValue >= 1000000 AND MONTH(createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(createdAt) = YEAR(NOW());
